allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card badge tabs progress dialog input select label separator scroll-area -y)
Bash(python -c "from main import app; print\(''import ok''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} attractions, first: {d[0][""name""]}''''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} restaurants, first: {d[0][""name""]}''''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} expenses:''''\); [print\(f''''  {e[""description""]} - {e[""currency""]} {e[""amount""]} \({e[""amount_twd""]} TWD\)''''\) for e in d]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} expenses:''''\); [print\(f''''  {e[""description""]} - {e[""currency""]} {e[""amount""]}''''\) for e in d]")
Bash(python -c "from database import run_migrations, seed_data; run_migrations\(\); seed_data\(\); print\(''OK''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''OK - {len\(d\)} checklist items''''\)")
